ops.text: Phase C dispatched as workflow wf_4fc6e0c6-0a0 (fresh run; the dead wf_5e0cab49-6e1 confirmed to have written nothing): opus-xhigh implementer (dispatch.go --dispatch/--owner + cmdSpec Owner/Session/Scope/ClaudePID; detach.go directWake shared with directCmd, fail-open, wake-only; tests incl. directive-landing against an in-process daemon in isolated HOME) → parallel opus-xhigh verify lanes (correctness refuter + reuse/dead-code auditor — the latter two per user directives added at approval: sweep all dead code; reuse cc-interact/daemonkit, never re-implement). Meanwhile on fable inline: plan question on awaitTimeout resolved from pinned v0.12.0 source — channel.NewAwaitTool long-polls in 25s chunks with progress pings between (holds a park open), takes per-call timeout_seconds up to 86400, and returns a non-error "no directive — re-park" notice, so the 4m default stays and prose documents timeout_seconds + the re-park loop. Prose landed (slop-cop triaged): SKILL.md "Async Dispatch (owner subagents and the steering channel)" section; new agents/codex-wrapper-async.md (sonnet low relay owning one lane: cheap first call to collect greeting/agent-id, --dispatch --owner, park on await, read disk on wake). Greeting-delivery mechanic verified against agent_plane.py: registration at SubagentStart, delivery as PreToolUse additionalContext — an owner needs one tool call before it knows its id.
